## Important

If Codex shows this error:

> Codex does not currently support updating PRs that are updated outside of Codex. For now, please create a new PR.

Do **not** try to update the same PR again. Open a **brand-new PR** from the latest `main` commit.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is a **new PR** (not a Codex update attempt on an externally modified PR)
- [ ] `Build Windows App` Action passed
- [ ] The artifact `QuoteConverter-windows` was produced
